notes: Science-backed experiment catalog from docs/science-backed-experiment-canvas.md. displayTier: 1=featured, 2=more experiments, 3=Lab Plus locked.

categories.name: Stress
categories.description: Reduce tension, anxiety, and mental overload.

categories.name: Sleep
categories.description: Improve sleep quality, consistency, and recovery.

categories.name: Energy
categories.description: Feel more alert, energized, and physically ready.

categories.name: Mood
categories.description: Feel happier, more positive, and emotionally steady.

categories.name: Focus
categories.description: Improve concentration, clarity, and attention.

categories.name: Productivity
categories.description: Execute better, plan smarter, and finish what matters.

categories.name: Weight Loss
categories.description: Support fat loss, appetite control, and healthier habits.

categories.name: Fitness
categories.description: Build strength, endurance, and physical capability.

categories.name: Nutrition
categories.description: Eat better with simple, sustainable food experiments.

categories.name: Relationships
categories.description: Improve connection with friends, family, and partners.

categories.name: Confidence
categories.description: Build social courage, self-belief, and comfort in action.

categories.name: Money
categories.description: Improve financial habits, awareness, and discipline.

categories.name: Learning
categories.description: Learn faster, retain more, and build useful skills.

categories.name: Longevity
categories.description: Support long-term healthspan and disease prevention.

categories.name: Curiosity Lab
categories.description: Add novelty, exploration, and memorable experiences.

categories.name: Entrepreneurship
categories.description: Test ideas, build courage, and talk to customers.

categories.name: Kindness
categories.description: Practice kindness, purpose, and good deeds daily.

categories.name: Planet Saver
categories.description: Reduce environmental impact through small daily actions.

categories.name: Creativity
categories.description: Spark ideas, play, and creative output.

categories.name: Supplement Curiosity
categories.description: Curiosity experiments — use carefully, not medical advice.

experiments.name: The 10-Min Audio Lab
experiments.action: Listen to 10 minutes of educational audio.

experiments.name: The 10-Min Mobility Lab
experiments.action: Do 10 minutes of mobility daily.

experiments.name: The 20-20-20 Eye Reset
experiments.action: Every 20 minutes, look 20 feet away for 20 seconds.

experiments.name: The 24-Hour Cart Freeze
experiments.action: Wait 24 hours before nonessential purchases.

experiments.name: The $5 Sale
experiments.action: Sell anything legal for at least $5.

experiments.name: The 5-Minute Breathing Lab
experiments.action: Do 5 minutes of slow nasal breathing.

experiments.name: The 8K Step Study
experiments.action: Walk 8,000 steps daily.

experiments.name: The Animal Shelter Hour
experiments.action: Volunteer at a local animal shelter or similar nonprofit.

experiments.name: The Appreciation Text
experiments.action: Send one genuine appreciation text daily.

experiments.name: The Auto-Save Trial
experiments.action: Automate a small savings transfer.

experiments.name: The Bad Ideas Sprint
experiments.action: Write 10 terrible ideas on purpose.

experiments.name: The Beans Are Back Lab
experiments.action: Eat beans/lentils/chickpeas once daily.

experiments.name: The Beans-Not-Beef Swap
experiments.action: Replace one beef meal with beans/lentils.

experiments.name: The Better Question
experiments.action: Ask one deeper follow-up question in a conversation.

experiments.name: The Book Instead
experiments.action: Read a physical book for 10 minutes before bed.

experiments.name: The Brain Dump Study
experiments.action: Write every worry in your head for 5 minutes before bed.

experiments.name: The Brave Action
experiments.action: Do one small socially uncomfortable action.

experiments.name: The Caffeine Curfew
experiments.action: No caffeine after noon.

experiments.name: The Caffeine Reset
experiments.action: Delay caffeine 60–90 minutes after waking.

experiments.name: The Chair Stand Test
experiments.action: Count chair stands in 30 seconds.

experiments.name: The Clean Desk Study
experiments.action: Clear your work surface before one work block.

experiments.name: The Cold Ask
experiments.action: Send one respectful ask to someone ahead of you.

experiments.name: The Compliment Spark
experiments.action: Give one genuine compliment daily.

experiments.name: The Constraint Game
experiments.action: Create something with one weird rule or limitation.

experiments.name: The Cool Room Trial
experiments.action: Lower bedroom temperature / keep room cool for sleep.

experiments.name: The Core Check
experiments.action: Do one short core set daily.

experiments.name: The Customer Language Hunt
experiments.action: Collect 10 exact phrases customers use about the problem.

experiments.name: The Daily Walk Baseline
experiments.action: Walk 20 minutes daily.

experiments.name: The Digital Sunset
experiments.action: No screens 60 minutes before bed.

experiments.name: The Dinner Walk
experiments.action: Walk 20 minutes after dinner.

experiments.name: The Discount Ask
experiments.action: Ask for a small discount at a coffee shop or store.

experiments.name: The Electrolyte Check
experiments.action: Add electrolytes only when sweating heavily; track energy.

experiments.name: The Evening Walk Downshift
experiments.action: Walk for 10 minutes after dinner.

experiments.name: The Fiber Boost
experiments.action: Add beans, lentils, vegetables, or oats once daily.

experiments.name: The Fish Instead Study
experiments.action: Choose lower-impact protein like fish or legumes instead of beef.

experiments.name: The Flamingo Balance Test
experiments.action: Stand on one leg while brushing teeth.

experiments.name: The Flowers Experiment
experiments.action: Give flowers or a small thoughtful gift.

experiments.name: The Food Photo Log
experiments.action: Photograph meals before eating.

experiments.name: The Forest Reset
experiments.action: Take a 10–20 minute walk outside with no phone audio.

experiments.name: The Forgotten Call
experiments.action: Call a parent, grandparent, or old friend.

experiments.name: The Friend Ping
experiments.action: Text or call one friend daily.

experiments.name: The Good Deed Data Point
experiments.action: Do one anonymous good deed.

experiments.name: The Good Job Signal
experiments.action: Tell someone specifically what they did well.

experiments.name: The Grocery Budget Study
experiments.action: Set a grocery budget before shopping.

experiments.name: The Grounding Curiosity Check
experiments.action: Stand barefoot outside and track mood/stress only.

experiments.name: The Helping Hand
experiments.action: Help an older person or neighbor with a small task.

experiments.name: The Hourly Stand-Up
experiments.action: Stand up once every hour.

experiments.name: The Hydration Baseline
experiments.action: Drink water first thing in the morning.

experiments.name: The Idea Walk
experiments.action: Bring one problem on a walk and capture solutions after.

experiments.name: The Joy Audit
experiments.action: Track one thing that gave you energy or joy.

experiments.name: The Landing Page Hypothesis
experiments.action: Write one sentence: who it helps, what pain, what result.

experiments.name: The Letter Lab
experiments.action: Write and send a real letter.

experiments.name: The Listen-Without-Fixing Trial
experiments.action: Listen for 10 minutes without advice unless asked.

experiments.name: The Low-Waste Lunch
experiments.action: Pack or choose one low-packaging meal.

experiments.name: The Magnesium Check
experiments.action: Take magnesium only if safe for you, then track sleep.

experiments.name: The Make-Someone-Smile Lab
experiments.action: Do one small thing to make someone smile.

experiments.name: The Meatless Monday Lab
experiments.action: Eat vegetarian for one day.

experiments.name: The Mediterranean Plate
experiments.action: Build one Mediterranean-style meal daily.

experiments.name: The Mindful Bite
experiments.action: Eat one meal without screens.

experiments.name: The Morning Walk Charge
experiments.action: Walk 10 minutes in the morning.

experiments.name: The Movement Snack
experiments.action: Every 2–3 hours, do 1 minute of movement.

experiments.name: The Mushroom Coffee Check
experiments.action: Swap normal coffee for mushroom coffee and track focus/anxiety.

experiments.name: The Music Lift
experiments.action: Listen to one mood-boosting song intentionally.

experiments.name: The Neighbor Knock
experiments.action: Introduce yourself to a nearby neighbor.

experiments.name: The No-Added-Salt Awareness Lab
experiments.action: Avoid adding salt at the table and track meals.

experiments.name: The No-Alcohol Check
experiments.action: Avoid alcohol and track sleep/energy.

experiments.name: The No-Caffeine Trial
experiments.action: Avoid caffeine and track sleep, anxiety, and energy.

experiments.name: The No-Complaint Day
experiments.action: Go one day without complaining; mark slips as data points.

experiments.name: The No Fast Food Trial
experiments.action: Avoid fast food for 7–21 days.

experiments.name: The No-News Window
experiments.action: Avoid news for the first 2 hours after waking.

experiments.name: The No-Phone First Hour
experiments.action: Avoid phone for first hour of the workday.

experiments.name: The No-Spend Day
experiments.action: Buy nothing nonessential for one day.

experiments.name: The No-Sugary-Drink Trial
experiments.action: Replace sugary drinks with water/zero-calorie options.

experiments.name: The Nutritional Yeast Add-On
experiments.action: Add nutritional yeast to one meal for B-vitamin/plant-food experiment.

experiments.name: The Offer Test
experiments.action: Ask 10 people whether they would pay for a simple offer.

experiments.name: The One-New-Word Study
experiments.action: Learn and use one new word daily.

experiments.name: The One-Page Rule
experiments.action: Read at least one page daily.

experiments.name: The One-Project Rule
experiments.action: Pick one project to advance before any new ideas.

experiments.name: The One-Task Lab
experiments.action: Work on one task without task-switching.

experiments.name: The Opposite Opinion
experiments.action: Read one thoughtful argument you disagree with.

experiments.name: The Outdoor Mood Loop
experiments.action: Spend 10 minutes outside daily.

experiments.name: The Phone-Down Dinner
experiments.action: No phone during dinner or one shared meal.

experiments.name: The Phone-Free Morning
experiments.action: No phone for the first 30 minutes after waking.

experiments.name: The Phone Vault
experiments.action: Put phone in another room for 60 minutes.

experiments.name: The Pocket Sketch
experiments.action: Draw anything in under 60 seconds.

experiments.name: The Positive Review Drop
experiments.action: Leave a sincere positive review for a local business.

experiments.name: The Presence Posture
experiments.action: Practice upright posture before a social moment.

experiments.name: The Price Confidence Lab
experiments.action: Say your price out loud to one real person.

experiments.name: The Priority Card
experiments.action: Write the single most important task before starting.

experiments.name: The Problem Interview
experiments.action: Ask 3 people what frustrates them about a problem space.

experiments.name: The Protein Breakfast Test
experiments.action: Eat protein at breakfast.

experiments.name: The Protein Every Meal Test
experiments.action: Include a protein source at each meal.

experiments.name: The Protein Start
experiments.action: Eat a protein-forward breakfast.

experiments.name: The Push-Up Alarm
experiments.action: At 10, 12, and 2, do max clean pushups or a scaled version.

experiments.name: The Question Collector
experiments.action: Ask one person an interesting question.

experiments.name: The Random Route
experiments.action: Take a different route somewhere routine.

experiments.name: The Receipt Reality Check
experiments.action: Track every purchase for 7–14 days.

experiments.name: The Recycle Right Check
experiments.action: Correctly recycle or remove contamination from recycling once daily.

experiments.name: The Rejection Rep
experiments.action: Collect one harmless rejection on purpose.

experiments.name: The Retrieval Rep
experiments.action: Quiz yourself after learning instead of rereading.

experiments.name: The Reusable Cup Trial
experiments.action: Use no disposable cups/bottles for one day.

experiments.name: The Same-Time Sleep Lab
experiments.action: Keep bedtime and wake time within a 30-minute window.

experiments.name: The Self-Compliment Lab
experiments.action: Write one thing you did well today.

experiments.name: The Skill Block
experiments.action: Practice one skill for 30 minutes.

experiments.name: The Sleep-Energy Link
experiments.action: Sleep 8 hours in bed and compare next-day energy.

experiments.name: The Smile First Study
experiments.action: Smile first at 10 people.

experiments.name: The Song Memory Lab
experiments.action: Listen to an old song and write what it brings up.

experiments.name: The Speak-Up Once
experiments.action: Say one thing you'd normally keep quiet.

experiments.name: The Start Before Scroll
experiments.action: Do 5 minutes of work before checking feeds.

experiments.name: The Strength 3x Study
experiments.action: Strength train 3 times per week.

experiments.name: The Stretch Signal
experiments.action: Stretch for 3 minutes before bed.

experiments.name: The Stretch Two-Minute Lab
experiments.action: Stretch for 2 minutes daily.

experiments.name: The Study Before Scroll
experiments.action: Do 10 minutes of learning before social media.

experiments.name: The Subscription Hunt
experiments.action: Cancel or downgrade one unused subscription.

experiments.name: The Sunrise Switch
experiments.action: Get outdoor light within 30 minutes of waking.

experiments.name: The Teach-the-Wall Test
experiments.action: Learn for 10 minutes, then explain it out loud.

experiments.name: The Ten-Minute Reset
experiments.action: Set a 10-minute timer and reset your space/workflow.

experiments.name: The Terrible Poem
experiments.action: Write a deliberately bad poem in 2 minutes.

experiments.name: The Three Good Things Lab
experiments.action: Write 3 good things that happened today.

experiments.name: The Tiny Adventure
experiments.action: Visit a place nearby you've never entered.

experiments.name: The Tiny Declutter
experiments.action: Clear one small visible area.

experiments.name: The Tomato Timer
experiments.action: 25 minutes focused work + 5 minute break.

experiments.name: The Tomorrow Tonight Lab
experiments.action: Plan tomorrow before going to bed.

experiments.name: The Top Three Test
experiments.action: Write only 3 important tasks for the day.

experiments.name: The Tourist Day
experiments.action: Act like a tourist in your own town for one hour.

experiments.name: The Trash Ten
experiments.action: Pick up 10 pieces of litter during a walk.

experiments.name: The Try-Something-New Study
experiments.action: Try one new thing daily, tiny allowed.

experiments.name: The Turmeric Food Test
experiments.action: Add turmeric-containing food and track subjective soreness.

experiments.name: The Ultra-Processed Pause
experiments.action: Avoid ultra-processed foods for one meal daily.

experiments.name: The Veggie Add-On
experiments.action: Add vegetables to 2 meals daily.

experiments.name: The Walking Ideas Lab
experiments.action: Walk for 10 minutes, then write 10 ideas.

experiments.name: The Water Before Coffee Test
experiments.action: Drink one full glass of water before caffeine.

experiments.name: The Weekly Money Date
experiments.action: Review spending once per week.

experiments.name: The Wellness Stack Test
experiments.action: Combine sunlight + walk + bedtime consistency.

experiments.name: The Whole Breakfast
experiments.action: Eat minimally processed breakfast.

experiments.name: The Work Sprint
experiments.action: One 60-minute focused work block.

experiments.name: The Write-One-Thing Lab
experiments.action: Write one thing you learned today.

experiments.name: The Zone 2 Trial
experiments.action: Do conversational-pace cardio 3x/week.
